title: (rootless) podman stats -- only "net_io" isn't generated !!
body:
/kind bug

o In rootless mode, "podman stats" not display only "net_io" metric.

o. When run "podman stats", net_io metic not displayed. ( I am testing 3 server having same environment, but always not displayed)
		{
			"id": "8395bb96b52b",
			"name": "condescending_jang",
			"cpu_time": "37.474ms",
			"cpu_percent": "--",
			"avg_cpu": "0.01%",
			"mem_usage": "573.4kB / 4.295GB", 
			"mem_percent": "0.01%",
			**"net_io": "-- / --",**
			"block_io": "24.58kB / 4.096kB",
			"pids": "1"
		}

o. podman info --

o. rpm -q podman  result
```
[admin@xen6 ~]$ rpm -q podman
podman-4.0.2-1.module_el8.7.0+1106+45480ee0.x86_64
```

o. Is troubleshooting guide checke ? : YES

o. My Environment 

```
[admin@hds01 testapp]$ uname -a
Linux hds01 4.18.0-305.el8.x86_64 #1 SMP 

[admin@hds01 testapp]$ gcc --version
gcc (GCC) 8.4.1 20200928 (Red Hat 8.4.1-1)
```

comments.body: As said in the other issue this is already fixed in the latest version.
